name: Grandfather's Soul
overview: Yasmine is a failed plastic surgeon. She performed an operation on a famous artist and failed, which prompted the artist to file a case against her and force her to pay a fine of 10 million pounds. She had to sell the palace, but she was surprised to find no contract. During her search for the necklace inside the palace, she encountered events stranger than fiction...?!!

trailers.title: الإعلان الرسمي لمسلسل "روح جدو" | Shofha | Rouh Gedo Official Trailer
